site.title: Dan Gilleland - Freelance front-end Developer
site.description: I'm a developer based in Italy, passionate about user experience and specializing in engaging animations and micro-interactions. My primary tools of choice include: JavaScript, React, Solid.js, Astro, Svelte, and Node.js.

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Dan, an instructor at NAIT and an on-again/off-again IT consultant.

about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about Jesus.
about.approach: While I have some preferred tools, I can quicklhy learn the one specified for the job, even if it's not on my usual list. I know that the right toolset depends on the needs of each project.
